summary.top_story: OpenAI GPT-5.6 (Sol/Terra/Luna) restricted to trusted partners — with US government blocking the public release
summary.notes: Two newsletters (uid=288 and uid=289) cover the same breaking story from different angles: regulatory (Washington blocks) and product (OpenAI restricts to trusted partners). These should be merged into a single event page. The GPT-5.6 model family naming (Sol/Terra/Luna) is noteworthy for model architecture tracking. Links from beehiiv (uid=288) are all tracked redirects — no raw URLs extractable without following redirects.
